'''Bador''' was one of the two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] and were the headquarters of gang bosses [[Cherit]] and [[L. Fraig]]. It was home to weapons and facilities for testing drives. It was initially not [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]], though this had evidently changed by [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and [[Mirta Gev]] visited this moon.

{{Moon-stub}}
